name: Irish Whiskey Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Baked graham cracker crust - cooled, 10 inch size
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg yolks until thick and lemon-colored.
2. Slowly beat in the sugar.
3. Soften gelatin in cold water, then add to the egg yolks and stir quickly.
4. Pour in the remaining Irish whiskey. Mix well.
5. Whip cream and add 1 cup to the mixture. Pour filling into the pie shell.
6. Chill until set.
7. Decorate with a border of whipped cream and sprinkle shaved chocolate over the center.
8. Enjoy.
